tool_args.label: Westbury Transit Oriented Development
tool_args.raw_text: Agreement with Mill Creek Residential Trust, LLC to construct and operate a Transit Oriented Development on the commuter parking lot at the Westbury Station, Westbury, New York

payload.description: 99-year ground lease for mixed-use residential and retail transit-oriented development on former LIRR Westbury Station commuter parking lot. Conditional designation of Mill Creek Residential Trust, LLC as developer. Base rent $650,000 first year for Scenario 1 (255,000SF/250 units) or $610,000 first year for Scenario 2 (215,000SF/200 units).

tool_args.label: City Winery License at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: License Agreement with City Winery for food and beverage uses in Grand Central Terminal, New York, New York

payload.project_name: City Winery License at Grand Central Terminal
payload.description: Three-year license agreement with one two-year option for full-service restaurant, bar/gastropub, and grab-and-go food and beverage at Vanderbilt Hall West spaces in Grand Central Terminal. Base rent $500,000 (Year 1) escalating to $1,000,000 (Year 3). Plus percentage rent.
payload.location: Grand Central Terminal, New York, New York

location_normalized.raw_text: Grand Central Terminal, New York, New York

tool_args.label: MNR PTC Software Upgrade on M-8 Fleet
tool_args.raw_text: Perform PTC Software Upgrade, Technical and Field Support Services on MNR's M-8 Fleet

payload.project_name: MNR PTC Software Upgrade on M-8 Fleet
payload.description: 17-month (March 2022-July 2023) contract to Alstom Signaling, Inc. for Positive Train Control software upgrades, technical support, and field qualification services to enhance Automatic Train Control and Advanced Civil Speed Enforcement System on Metro-North Railroad M-8 fleet. Federally funded, 65% reimbursable by Connecticut Department of Transportation.

tool_args.label: NYCT Purchase of 52 R252 Flatcars
tool_args.raw_text: Purchase of 52 R252 Flatcars

payload.project_name: NYCT Purchase of 52 R252 Flatcars (Contract R34252, Option B)
payload.description: Exercise of Option B on Contract R34252 to purchase 52 R252 flatcars and related non-car items (spare parts, technical documentation) for NYC Transit Department of Subways from Harsco Metro Rail, LLC. Funded from 2020-2024 Capital Program.

tool_args.label: MTAPD Public Safety Software Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: Replacement of MTAPD's Public Safety software with CentralSquare Technologies

payload.description: Contract to CentralSquare Technologies, LLC to replace MTAPD's Tiburon Public Safety software (in use for over 17 years) with new system including GIS mapping, AVL, records retrieval, field reporting, and web-based records management. RFP released to 17 firms, 4 proposals received. Best-and-final offer of $11.5 million after negotiations, a 17% reduction from initial cost proposal.

tool_args.label: Finance Committee Meeting - March 28, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, Finance Committee Meeting 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY 10004 Monday, March 28, 2022 Scheduled 1:30 PM

payload.description: MTA Finance Committee meeting. Topics included: Public Comments, Approval of Minutes, Committee Work Plan, BudgetWatch, FinanceWatch, Action Items (Federal Grants Authorization, 2021 Annual Procurement Report), MTA Prompt Payment Annual Report, CentralSquare Technologies procurement.

tool_args.label: Finance Committee Meeting - April 25, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY 10004 Monday, 4/25/2022 12:45 - 1:45 PM ET

payload.description: MTA Finance Committee meeting. Agenda included: Summary of Actions, Public Comments, Approval of Minutes (March 28, 2022), 2022 Committee Work Plan, BudgetWatch/FinanceWatch, MTA Headquarters & All-Agency Items, Metro-North/LIRR items, NYCT/MTA Bus Operations, Consolidated Reports, and Real Estate Agenda.

tool_args.label: North White Plains Station Parking License
tool_args.raw_text: License Agreement for Commuter Parking Lot Management at the North White Plains Station

payload.project_name: North White Plains Station Parking License Agreement
payload.description: Five-year license (May 1, 2022-April 30, 2027) for County of Westchester to operate and maintain Metro-North's 392-space commuter parking lot at North White Plains Station. 60/40% gross revenue share. County covers maintenance from its 60% share.
payload.location: North White Plains Station, North White Plains, New York

location_normalized.raw_text: North White Plains Station, North White Plains, New York

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: 125th Street Station Retail Concession
tool_args.raw_text: License agreement with Manhattan News Inc., for a retail convenience location in the 125th Street Station, New York, New York

payload.description: Five-year license agreement for approximately 350 sq. ft. retail convenience unit at Metro-North 125th Street Station. First year compensation $24,000 with 3% annual increases. NPV of 10-year proposal: $199,746.
payload.location: 125th Street Station, New York, New York

location_normalized.raw_text: 125th Street Station, New York, New York

tool_args.label: Pearl River Station Building Lease - Bru Brew LLC
tool_args.raw_text: Modification of lease terms with Bru Brew LLC for the Pearl River station building, Pearl River, New York

payload.project_name: Pearl River Station Building Lease - Bru Brew LLC
payload.description: Revised lease terms with Bru Brew LLC for operation of a restaurant at Pearl River Station. Rent escalation changed from 3% to 2% annually. Two extension terms of five years each at fair market value. Updated NPV: $349,670.
payload.location: Pearl River Station, Pearl River, Rockland County, New York

location_normalized.raw_text: Pearl River Station, Pearl River, Rockland County, New York

tool_args.label: Ridership remains below pre-pandemic levels but gradually improving
tool_args.raw_text: Deputy Chief Young noted that ridership remains below pre-pandemic levels and revenues are below Budget targets, but ridership is gradually improving, and the magnitude of the revenue shortfall was less in February than it was in January.

payload.claim_text: Ridership remains below pre-pandemic levels and revenues are below Budget targets, but ridership is gradually improving. The magnitude of the revenue shortfall was less in February than it was in January.

tool_args.label: Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel Fuel Hedge March 2022
tool_args.raw_text: On March 31, 2022, MTA executed a 2,826,761 gallon ultra-low sulfur diesel fuel hedge with Cargill Incorporated at an all-in price of $2.747/gallon.

payload.description: 2,826,761 gallon ultra-low sulfur diesel fuel hedge with Cargill Incorporated at $2.747/gallon. Covers period from March 2023 through February 2024.

tool_args.label: ADA Elevator Construction at Grand Street Subway Station
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT is constructing elevators at 8 subway stations across New York City in support of improving accessibility to the stations in compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).

payload.description: NYCT is constructing elevators at 8 subway stations across New York City for ADA accessibility. Construction access licenses at 809 Grand Street and 819 Grand Street, Brooklyn, adjacent to Grand Street subway station on the Canarsie Line.
locations: Grand Street subway station (Canarsie Line), Brooklyn, New York
payload.location_text: 809 Grand Street and 819 Grand Street, Brooklyn, New York
